analysis: The project is a static website about black holes with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript files. The current theme appears to be dark and cosmic, but it needs to be enhanced with more animated objects, slides, and interactive elements related to black holes. The CSS file should include more animations and visual effects to create a dynamic and immersive experience.

Add more interactive elements and animated slides to the HTML content, ensuring all sections are properly included and related to black holes, such as interactive planets and cosmic visuals.
Implement additional JavaScript functions to control the animations and interactions, ensuring all buttons and interactive elements have proper event handlers and functionality.
